case_title: GONZALEZ, STEVEN JR. VS FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,187.97 FILED BY GONZALEZ, STEVEN JR. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, STEVEN JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E. $1,187.97 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,233.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E. HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF APR-10-1998, GRANTED
MOTION TO INCREASE MONTHLY PAYMENT TO $200/MO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, STEVEN JR. HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO INCREASE MONTHLY PAYMENT TO $200/MO. OF MAY-13-1998, DENIED
REQUEST BY PLTF. TO RECONSIDER ORDER PAYMENT IS EXEMPT. OK'D BY NORA SHEA.
PLFT WILL FILE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. ORDER CORRECTING TIME PAYMENT OF $25. PER MONTH
REQUEST TO RECONSIDER ORDER OF 4/10/98. TO BE SUBMITTED TO SUE KAPLAN FOR REVIEW. REQUEST GIVEN TO NORA SHEA FOR 15 DAY HOLD.
REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION: PAYMENT IS EXEMPT. OK'D BY NORA SHEA.
REQUEST TO ESTABLISH TIME PAYMENT: DENIED. NOTICES SENT TO PARTIES.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, LOUISA GONZALEZ E.
